payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Front-facing dark reddish-brown wooden side table with a single shallow drawer above a paneled cabinet door, molded top and base trim, round dark knob hardware and a polished varnished surface; medium-sized and mostly visible in the crop with only slight left-edge cropping, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
